creator: t-matubara@miracle.ocn.ne.jp
text:
Dear Gnome Team.

I want you to add mailnag in gnome-shell-extension.

It was registered manually, but I didn't move.

Without icon indication.
Mail setting can't be done. A setting screen was in the state which is nowhere.

gnome3 Version : gnome3-lite-3.14.2

mailnag is
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/886/mailnag/


ports which moves is added or, I should be very much obliged if you can tell a corrective action.


Best regards
